headline: 89°F Memorial Day — trellis beans before they tangle
weather_notes: Water e1–e4 tomatoes deeply today — no rain forecast through Memorial Day and 83–89°F weekend heat will rapidly deplete bed moisture.
Check potato_bags moisture daily through Monday — 4-day Yukon Gold roots haven't established yet and bag soil dries twice as fast as beds in 83–89°F heat.
Pick from c2–c4 peas by Tuesday — 83–89°F heat this weekend accelerates pod fill and toughening, potentially pulling harvest ahead of the June 3 target.

surfaced_tasks.title: Install trellis in c1 bean bed
surfaced_tasks.reason: Overdue by 1 day and pole bean vines will accelerate fast through the 83–89°F weekend — tangling becomes hard to correct once vines outpace support.

suggested_tasks.title: Harvest check c4 peas before heat toughens pods
suggested_tasks.description: Lillian's Caseload had the most pods forming on May 12 — 89°F Memorial Day weekend will accelerate toughening and splitting; check and pick c4 first.
